title: A milestone moment for women’s health! 🌿
text: A milestone moment for women’s health! 🌿  NBC’s Priscilla Casper sits down with our very own Dr. Wendie Trubow to talk about the FDA’s removal of the black box warning for Menopause Hormone Therapy.  As a trusted women’s health expert, Wendie breaks down what this means for women everywhere.  ✨ Stay tuned — full interview drops November 24!  #WomensHealth #MenopauseAwareness #HormoneHealth #MenopauseSupport #HealthyAging #WomensWellness #HealthcareNews #nbcinterview

title: Hitting menopause means it’s time to switch things up! What worked before may not cut it now. Your body becomes less resilient, and you become more prone to insulin resistance and even diabetes. To…
text: Hitting menopause means it’s time to switch things up! What worked before may not cut it now. Your body becomes less resilient, and you become more prone to insulin resistance and even diabetes. To thrive, it’s all about balance: high protein, lower (not no) carbs, no processed foods, artificial colors, sugar, or alcohol. It’s not about ‘good’ or ‘bad’ — it’s about giving your body what it can handle. Ready to feel amazing? Ditch the sugar and alcohol, up your protein, and lower those processed carbs. You’ve got this!....#menopausetips#menopauseadvice #nutritionisthekey#healthyover40#menopausesupport#nutritiongoals#midlifewomen #perimenopause#womenswellness#integrativemedicine#insulinresistance#Menopause#fitover50#HealthyMindset#womenshealth#healthandwellness#reelsofig#reelsofinstagram #bostonhealth #fivejourneys  #healthreels

title: Did you know your gut health plays a crucial role in your perimenopause and menopause journey? 🌿
text: Did you know your gut health plays a crucial role in your perimenopause and menopause journey? 🌿   Estrogen can get recycled from your gut, affecting your hormone balance and symptoms. Constipation, enzyme imbalances, and stress all impact this process. Support your gut by increasing fiber, staying hydrated, cutting out processed foods, and managing stress for a smoother transition. 💪  . . . . . #GutHealth  #guthealthy  #HealthyGut  #womenshealth  #guthealthmatters  #DigestiveHealth  #healthyguthappylife  #GutMicrobiome  #HealthyDigestion  #Perimenopause  #MenopauseWellness  #HormoneBalance  #healthyliving  #FiveJourneys  #BostonCommunity  #BostonHealth  #healthylifestylechoices  #womenover50  #FunctionalMedicine  #reelsofig  #Wellbeing  #HolisticHealth

title: Prioritize sleep during menopause for a smoother transition 🌙✨ Establishing good sleep hygiene—like a consistent bedtime routine, avoiding screens before bed, and keeping your bedroom cool—can help m…
text: Prioritize sleep during menopause for a smoother transition 🌙✨ Establishing good sleep hygiene—like a consistent bedtime routine, avoiding screens before bed, and keeping your bedroom cool—can help manage symptoms like hot flashes, irritability, and brain fog. Take control of your nights to improve your days! 😴💤 . . . . #menopausemotivation  #womenshealthdoctor  #midlifewoman  #fitwomenover50  #sleephealth  #HealthySleep  #goodsleep #sleepislife  #sleeptip  #sleeptips  #SleepBetter  #HealthyMindset #sleepwell  #perimenopause #menopause  #womenshealth  #womensupportingwomen #reelsofinstagram  #reelsofig

title: 💪You’ve seen my reel on nutrition for menopause, now let’s talk exercise! 💃
text: 💪You’ve seen my reel on nutrition for menopause, now let’s talk exercise! 💃   During menopause, your body becomes less resilient, and your risk of heart disease rises. That’s why cardio 🏃‍♀️ is important, but so is lifting weights 🏋️‍♀️!   It’s not just about burning calories — you need to build muscle, strengthen your bones 🦴, and stay strong as your body changes.   As your risk of falls increases, being strong can help prevent injuries. So let’s get lifting and moving to stay healthy and powerful during menopause! 💥  . . . . #MenopauseMotivation #MenopauseWellness #StrengthInMenopause  #CardioAndWeights  #staystrong  #fivejourneys #exerciseinspiration  #perimenopause  #menopausefitness  #womenshealthmatters  #menopausehealth  #perimenopause #menopause  #womenover50  #womenover40  #fitness #fitover50  #womenshealth  #FitWomen  #healthreels #reelsofinstagram  #reelsofig
